nodes.label: Lasso regularization for selection/specification of log-linear models (R notebook)
Lasso regularization (glmnet, Poisson family) for log-linear model selection
nodes.rationale: Lasso penalty (glmnet, alpha=1) chosen over ridge (alpha=0) or elastic net (alpha=0.5) to induce sparsity in an otherwise saturated log-linear model for contingency tables; lambda selected via 10-fold cross-validation using the 1-SE rule on Poisson deviance to favor the most regularized (parsimonious) adequate model.

nodes.label: hg16 dataset (logmult package) - occupational mobility, 16 countries
